backend/main.mo: Main Motoko backend actor defining analysis data types (AnalysisResult, UserSettings, Timeframe), storing per-user analyses and settings in maps, and providing query/update functions for analysis history and user preferences with blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implementation of external API integration, removal of mock analysis logic, creation of analysisApi service, TypeScript interface definitions, and ProcessingScreen updates to call real AI endpoints.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, hooks, and services describing Portuguese UI text, external API integration via analysisApi, camera/upload functionality, and analysis result display from real API responses.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, title "Advance Signal Pro", root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, and settings pages, all wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using useCamera hook with Portuguese UI text, supporting photo capture, retake, camera switching, and error handling for permissions and device support.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based overlay component that draws support/resistance lines, trend arrows, and price labels on top of chart images based on analysis results.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A drag-and-drop file upload component that accepts PNG, JPG, JPEG, and PDF files up to 10MB, with validation, preview, and clear functionality.
Displays a single analysis result in a clickable card showing signal direction (buy/sell/hold), confidence percentage, timestamp, and trend direction with appropriate icons and colors.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that provides the page structure with header, main content area, toast notifications, and a footer with attribution to caffeine.ai.
Displays a single processing stage indicator with three states (pending, active with spinner, complete with checkmark) used in multi-step workflows.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A reusable settings row component that displays a label, description text, and a control element (like a switch or input) in a consistent layout.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal analysis result with direction (bullish/bearish/sideways), confidence percentage, trend strength, and appropriate visual indicators and colors.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Configures multiple AI provider endpoints (OpenAI, Gemini, Python backend, custom) with headers, API keys, timeout settings, and retry logic for chart analysis requests.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context provider for managing light/dark theme state with localStorage persistence and automatic CSS class application to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an ICP actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Hook that listens for paste events to capture images from the clipboard, handling permissions and errors for clipboard access.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP login/logout, managing auth client creation, identity state, and login status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for fetching analysis history, storing new analyses, and managing user settings through the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Custom React hook that wraps useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries to provide settings data, loading state, and an updateSettings function.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, base styles for typography and form elements, and utility classes for touch-friendly sizing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for uploading/capturing chart images via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then navigating to processing screen with the selected image stored in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying app branding, AI status indicator, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page component that fetches and displays a list of previous chart analyses using useGetAnalyses hook, with navigation back to dashboard or analyze page.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Processing screen that animates through analysis stages while calling external API to analyze chart image, then stores results in backend and navigates to results page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page displaying analysis outcomes including signal direction, confidence, chart overlay with resistance levels and patterns, and options to share or save the analysis.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component with theme toggle (dark/light), AI sensitivity slider (0-100%), default timeframe selector (M1/M5/M10), and signal notifications toggle. Includes back navigation to dashboard and loading state.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: API service for sending chart images to external AI analysis endpoint with retry logic (exponential backoff), timeout handling, progress tracking, and error handling. Returns structured analysis response with signal, trend, confidence, patterns, and explanation.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript type definitions for external API responses, including ApiAnalysisResponse (signal, trend, confidence, patterns, explanation) and ApiError interfaces.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function to convert bigint nanosecond timestamps to Portuguese-formatted date strings (e.g., '15 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps external API analysis responses to internal AnalysisResult format, converting signal/trend strings to enums, pattern strings to CandlestickPattern types, and generating mock resistance levels.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility for sharing analysis results via native share API or clipboard fallback, formatting signal, confidence, trend, and trend strength into Portuguese text.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system for theming, extended spacing/sizing for touch targets, custom animations (accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining Advance Signal Pro as a mobile trading chart analysis app using external AI REST API, supporting M1/M5/M10 timeframes, Portuguese interface, and features including upload, processing, results display, history, and settings.
